category.scope_note: Electric and cordless hand-held, transportable, and lawn-and-garden power tools exported from China to Uganda, covering electrical safety, electromagnetic compatibility, market access and conformity assessment, noise, restricted substances, and batteries for cordless tools.

title.en: China-to-Uganda Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Uganda requirements: UNBS mandatory PVoC, Certificate of Conformity and Q-Mark, adopted US and IEC 62841 safety standards, UCC radio approval for cordless tools, and the occupational framework under the Ministry of Gender, Labour and Social Development.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与乌干达要求差距对照：UNBS 强制 PVoC、符合性证书与 Q-Mark、采用的美国及 IEC 62841 安全标准、无绳工具的 UCC 无线电核准，以及性别、劳工和社会发展部下的职业安全框架。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與烏干達要求差距對照：UNBS 強制 PVoC、符合性證書與 Q-Mark、採用的美國及 IEC 62841 安全標準、無繩工具的 UCC 無線電核准，以及性別、勞工和社會發展部下的職業安全框架。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, PVoC certificate, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Uganda law, UNBS standards and PVoC routes, UCC radio rules, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、PVoC 证书、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行乌干达法律、UNBS 标准及 PVoC 路径、UCC 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、PVoC 證書、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏干達法律、UNBS 標準及 PVoC 路徑、UCC 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Uganda, the mandatory baseline is UNBS conformity through the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, leading to a Certificate of Conformity and, for locally certified products, the Q-Mark; Uganda commonly adopts US and IEC standards, including IEC 62841 for tool safety. Cordless tools with radio functions also need UCC type approval. There is no EU-style outdoor-noise product-marking regime in Uganda, so noise is handled through general standards and workplace safety rather than a dedicated product directive.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入乌干达，强制基线是通过出口前符合性验证（PVoC）程序取得 UNBS 符合性，进而获得符合性证书，本地认证产品还可取得 Q-Mark；乌干达通常采用美国和 IEC 标准，工具安全方面包括 IEC 62841。具无线电功能的无绳工具还需 UCC 型号核准。乌干达没有欧盟式的户外噪声产品标识制度，因此噪声通过一般标准和工作场所安全处理，而非专门的产品指令。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入烏干達，強制基線是通過出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）程序取得 UNBS 符合性，進而獲得符合性證書，本地認證產品還可取得 Q-Mark；烏干達通常採用美國和 IEC 標準，工具安全方面包括 IEC 62841。具無線電功能的無繩工具還需 UCC 型號核准。烏干達沒有歐盟式的戶外噪聲產品標識制度，因此噪聲通過一般標準和工作場所安全處理，而非專門的產品指令。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on a material change to Uganda UNBS, PVoC, or UCC requirements
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed stays false until a named reviewer confirms each source against the current official Uganda and standards-body publication.
